task_completion.description: Verify the survey is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'BRFSS Health Interview Survey 2024' (or containing 'BRFSS') in the LimeSurvey admin interface, such as the top navigation bar or survey list.

task_completion.description: Verify the presentation and navigation settings are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Presentation settings screen. 'Format' should be set to 'Group by group', 'Show progress bar' should be 'On', and 'Allow backward navigation' should be 'Off'.

task_completion.description: Verify the date stamp setting is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Publication & data control (or similar) settings screen. 'Date stamp' should be toggled to 'On'.

task_completion.description: Verify the welcome message contains the required introduction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Text elements settings or a text editor showing the welcome message. It must include words like 'State Department of Health', 'randomly' (or 'random'), and 'voluntary'.

task_completion.description: Verify the end message contains the required closing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Text elements settings or a text editor showing the end message. It must include 'thank' and 'health' (or 'community').

task_completion.description: Verify at least 3 question groups are created representing BRFSS core sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey structure menu (usually on the left) or group list. There should be at least 3 distinct groups with health-related names (e.g., Health Status, Health Care Access, Health Behaviors).

task_completion.description: Verify at least 5 BRFSS-style questions are created across the groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey structure menu or question list. There should be at least 5 distinct questions distributed among the groups.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the LimeSurvey admin interface, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered or generated the survey content.
integrity.visual_evidence: The questions and groups should appear as distinct elements in the LimeSurvey interface, not just a single block of text pasted into a single field.

integrity.description: Verify no external scripts were used to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of Python scripts, curl commands, or API tools used to configure the survey automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey must be titled 'BRFSS Health Interview Survey 2024' (or contain 'BRFSS'). Format must be 'Group by group'. Backward navigation must be disabled. Progress bar and Date stamp must be enabled. Welcome message must contain 'health', 'department', 'random', and 'voluntary'. End message must contain 'thank' and 'health' (or 'community'). There must be at least 3 question groups representing BRFSS core sections and at least 5 questions in total.
